title: M&A Due Diligence Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the M&A Due Diligence skill.

problem_statement.description: The specific diligence goal, such as validating a targeted valuation multiple or uncovering deal-breakers.

company_context.description: Overview of the acquiring organization and an introduction to the target entity being evaluated.

strategic_deal_thesis.description: Articulation of the core strategic rationale (e.g., geographic expansion, product adjacency, acqui-hire).

key_valuation_assumptions.description: Key assumptions driving the initial offer (e.g., specific revenue growth rates, expected cost synergies).

preliminary_target_information.description: Summary of preliminary financial and commercial information provided by the target.

upstream_valuation_findings.description: Optional findings from upstream valuation frameworks like DCF or Comparable Company Valuation.

known_red_flags.description: Optional known red flags or initial concerns raised by the deal team.
